title: ferray-random: no state serialization — can't save/restore Generator state
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's Generator supports pickle and __getstate__/__setstate__ for saving and restoring the full RNG state. This is critical for reproducible experiments: save RNG state at a checkpoint, restore it to continue from exactly that point. ferray-random has no serialization support — there's no way to inspect or restore the internal state of a BitGenerator. Add serde support (behind a feature flag) for Generator and all BitGenerator implementations, serializing the full internal state.
